text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, the long-awaited results,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What else could it be? Increasing my<n>fandom, of
course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A lack of notoriety would diminish the<n>significance
of racing in the Classic<n>Triple Crown, after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that correct, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, yes... Not that I could ever race<n>in the
Classic Triple Crown myself...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But fans are really important. I know<n>that for sure...

Indeed. I have instructed my fans to<n>gather at the
gymnasium.

If my efforts have succeeded, a<n>standing ovation
from a full house of<n>my adoring fans awaits!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I've failed, the crickets will chirp! It<n>won't be
much different from the<n>party at the end of last
year, I<n>suppose.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, who will show their face? A<n>benevolent
angel or a cackling<n>demon? Will the gymnasium be
full of<n>adoring fans or completely empty?
The moment of truth has come. Open!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...
That's Opera O! Hey, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The number of fans are... decent.<n>Same goes for
the applause.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my! The venue is alive with the<n>sound of
applause!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would not be an exaggeration to<n>say I have
charmed the people of the<n>world, would it,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her exaggerations, it isn't a<n>stretch to say
she'll be gaining even<n>more fans in the first race
of the the<n>Classic Triple Crown, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that the Satsuki Sho is<n>firmly in my
sights...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcome my fans, one and all! Lend<n>me your
ears!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O begins to give a speech.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The curtain to glory has been raised!<n>My mission
is simple, to defeat the<n>older generation and pass
the torch to<n>mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, to do so, I must make my<n>presence felt
in the Classic Triple<n>Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It will be a long and arduous journey.<n>A great and
powerful foe will likely<n>attempt to bar my path.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I shall not lose! The Overlord will<n>boldly fight
this adversary and claim<n>victory!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: But... who's the adversary?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Who? Who is it, Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My foe is no other than...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer? Go ahead, tell them!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She has the crowd in the palm of her<n>hand, but
with full confidence passes<n>their attention to me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's too early to know who'll be<n>favored in the
Classics. The first<n>name that comes to mind is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The Classics? On, no, no... I'd never<n>qualify. At
least... I don't think so!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, now is not the time to dawdle.<n>Visualize the
future—ignore the reality!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Step forward and see how gloriously<n>your
unexpected presence resounds<n>throughout this
venue.

My worthy adversary is you, Doto,<n>the surprise
villain! Take my hand and<n>rise onto the stage!
Come, come!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto starts vigorously pacing,<n>eyes
darting every which way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what to do? She's invitingme... The Opera O is asking me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: She's my idol... But I'm... weak.<n>Unghhh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to try, b-but... I just know... I'll<n>never...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I-I just... can't!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto runs away at full speed.<n>I guess that
push from Opera O is too<n>much pressure for her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! Is this a rejection?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the heavens... I must have made<n>her nervous
with this excessive<n>appeal of mine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I will not stop now. Yes, what has<n>just
transpired simply makes this a<n>cliffhanger.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! Who is this<n>great
adversary I speak of? They will<n>be revealed...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At the Satsuki Sho! So, come, and we<n>shall meet
again in the lush greens of<n>Nakayama, where I will
cross my<n>blade with theirs!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She's managed to spin a convincing<n>tale.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you have to find me a rival<n>before the
Satsuki Sho. They must be<n>exceptional, mind you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And, of course, I bear the full brunt of<n>it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Opera O... Her hand wasright there, and I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I'm sorry I'm... so weak.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Things get pretty out of hand with<n>today's event,
but T.M. Opera O<n>manages to gain more fans.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her path stretches forward now to<n>the Satsuki
Sho.
